name: Epiphany
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: After each stage starts, gain [StateArg1] Keyflare. At the start of a Boss Battle, gain 2 Arithmetica. In {Astral Reign}, this effect changes to "Increases the chance for the wielder's Dimensional Image Relic to appear by 100%."
lore: See that which cannot be seen; hear that which cannot be heard.
